LAW AND MOTION 302,DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER-CA, LLC, AND RASIER, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS. DEFENDANTS UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER, LLC, AND RASIER-CA, LLC'S PETITION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION OF THE SINGLE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF IN PLAINTIFF RICHARD LINCOLN'S COMPLAINT IS GRANTED AND THE ACTION IS STAYED PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF THE ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS. (SEE WORD MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) (AS FULLY REPORTED IN THE REPORTER'S TRANSCRIPT) ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN, CLERK: S. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Michael Guasco, Esq. appeared for the defendant. Mr. Guasco requested the matter be dismissed while they deal with arbitration. The Court ordered the case dismissed without prejudice. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Mar-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Richard Lincoln (949-500-6517) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Stephen C. Tedesco, esq. (415-677-3134) and Blair A. Copple, esq. (415-399-8499) of Littler Mendelson PC for Defendants.

RULING - A R G U E D. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTs UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC., RASIER-CA, LLC, and RASIER, LLC's Petition To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc., Rasier, LLC, and Rasier-CA, LLC's petition to compel arbitration of the single cause of action for declaratory relief in plaintiff Richard Lincoln's complaint is granted and the action is stayed pending the conclusion of the arbitration proceedings. (see word minutes for full details) (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript)

Order is signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
